# Cross-modality: spatial, bulk, and divergence checks {#sec-crossmodality}

```{r}
#| label: crossmodality-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(c(crossmodality_report, crossmodality_figures, story_figures)) # compact targets only, no heavy modality objects
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

cmr <- crossmodality_report
cmf <- crossmodality_figures
sf <- story_figures
alpha <- cmr$provenance$alpha
focus <- cmr$provenance$focus_contrasts
contrast_labels <- c(
  tau_alone = "tau alone",
  nlgf_in_maptki = "amyloid on MAPTKI",
  nlgf_in_p301s = "amyloid on P301S",
  tau_in_nlgf = "tau in NLGF",
  interaction = "interaction"
)
layer_labels <- c(
  proteome = "proteome",
  phospho_raw = "raw phospho",
  phospho_corrected = "corrected phospho"
)
modality_levels <- c("snRNAseq microglia", "GeoMx spatial",
                     "bulk proteome", "bulk phosphoproteome")
axis_labels <- c(
  DAM = "DAM",
  homeostatic = "homeostatic",
  synaptic = "synaptic",
  clearance = "clearance",
  complement = "complement",
  antigen_presentation = "antigen presentation",
  MHC_APC = "MHC/APC",
  IFN = "IFN",
  NFkB = "NF-kB",
  Myc = "Myc",
  Proliferative = "proliferative",
  other = "other"
)
fmt_p <- function(p) {
  out <- rep("-", length(p))
  ok <- is.finite(p)
  out[ok] <- ifelse(p[ok] < 0.001,
                    formatC(p[ok], format = "e", digits = 2),
                    formatC(p[ok], format = "f", digits = 3))
  out
}
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 2) ifelse(is.finite(x), formatC(x, format = "f", digits = digits), "-")
fmt_int <- function(x) format(as.integer(round(x)), big.mark = ",", trim = TRUE)
short_label <- function(x, n = 46L) {
  x <- gsub("^GO[A-Z]*_", "", x)
  x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
  ifelse(nchar(x) > n, paste0(substr(x, 1L, n - 3L), "..."), x)
}
wrap_label <- function(x, width = 22L) {
  vapply(as.character(x), function(s) {
    z <- strwrap(s, width = width)
    if (length(z)) paste(z, collapse = "\n") else s
  }, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
plot_contrast <- function(x, levels = focus, reverse = FALSE) {
  lv <- if (reverse) rev(levels) else levels
  factor(x, levels = lv, labels = unname(contrast_labels[lv]))
}
fmt_axis <- function(x) {
  vapply(strsplit(as.character(x), ";", fixed = TRUE), function(parts) {
    lab <- axis_labels[parts]
    lab[is.na(lab)] <- parts[is.na(lab)]
    paste(unname(lab), collapse = " / ")
  }, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
fmt_pair <- function(x) gsub("_", "-", x, fixed = TRUE)
one_row <- function(d, idx, label) {
  out <- d[idx, , drop = FALSE]
  stopifnot(nrow(out) >= 1L)
  out[1L, , drop = FALSE]
}

geom_counts <- cmr$geomx$counts
bulk_counts <- cmr$bulk$significant_counts
bulk_features <- cmr$bulk$feature_counts
run_index <- cmr$bulk$run_index
decon <- cmr$clearance$spatial_decon
pairs <- cmr$clearance$pair_support
contrast_summary <- cmr$divergence$contrast_summary

geo_volc_points <- cmf$geomx_volcano$points
geo_volc_points$contrast <- plot_contrast(geo_volc_points$contrast)
geo_volc_points$direction <- factor(as.character(geo_volc_points$direction),
                                    levels = c("down", "not significant", "up"))
geo_volc_lab <- cmf$geomx_volcano$labels
geo_volc_lab$contrast <- plot_contrast(geo_volc_lab$contrast)

geo_sens <- cmf$geomx_sensitivity
geo_sens <- geo_sens[geo_sens$contrast %in% focus, , drop = FALSE]
geo_sens$contrast <- plot_contrast(geo_sens$contrast)
geo_sens$fit_label <- c(unblocked = "unblocked AOI",
                        collapsed_bio_unit = "bio-unit collapsed")[geo_sens$fit]
geo_sens$fit_label[is.na(geo_sens$fit_label)] <- geo_sens$fit[is.na(geo_sens$fit_label)]
geo_sens$fit_label <- factor(geo_sens$fit_label,
                             levels = c("unblocked AOI", "bio-unit collapsed"))

pc_points <- cmf$phospho_raw_corrected$points
pc_points$contrast <- plot_contrast(pc_points$contrast)
pc_points$status <- factor(as.character(pc_points$status),
                           levels = c("not significant", "raw only", "corrected only", "both"))
pc_lab <- cmf$phospho_raw_corrected$labels
pc_lab$best_fdr <- pmin(pc_lab$raw_fdr, pc_lab$corrected_fdr)
pc_lab <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(pc_lab, pc_lab$contrast, drop = TRUE), function(d) {
  d <- d[order(d$best_fdr, -abs(d$raw_logFC) - abs(d$corrected_logFC),
               d$site_id, method = "radix", na.last = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
  head(d, 6L)
}))
pc_lab$contrast <- plot_contrast(pc_lab$contrast)
pc_lab$site_label <- wrap_label(gsub("_", " ", pc_lab$site_id, fixed = TRUE), 14L)

# Cross-modality axis plates share one idiom (plate_support_matrix): modality on x, feature on
# y, signed-effect fill, a ring for supported vs measured, and faint glyphs for not-observed /
# blocked cells. Short modality names keep the matrix columns legible.
modality_short <- c(`snRNAseq microglia` = "snRNAseq", `GeoMx spatial` = "GeoMx",
                    `bulk proteome` = "proteome", `bulk phosphoproteome` = "phospho",
                    `TF activity` = "TF activity", `kinase activity` = "kinase activity",
                    `cross-modality pathway` = "pathway", `clearance pair` = "pair")
shorten_modality <- function(d) {
  lv <- levels(d$modality_label)
  if (is.null(lv)) lv <- sort(unique(as.character(d$modality_label)))
  map <- ifelse(is.na(modality_short[lv]), lv, unname(modality_short[lv]))
  cur <- as.character(d$modality_label)
  d$modality_label <- factor(ifelse(is.na(modality_short[cur]), cur, unname(modality_short[cur])),
                             levels = unique(map))
  d
}
split_plate <- function(plate) {
  list(measured = shorten_modality(plate[plate$measured_state_chr == "measured", , drop = FALSE]),
       missing = shorten_modality(plate[plate$measured_state_chr != "measured", , drop = FALSE]))
}
amyloid <- split_plate(cmf$amyloid_response_plate$effects)
synclr <- split_plate(cmf$synaptic_clearance_plate$effects)
interaction_bd <- split_plate(cmf$interaction_boundary_plate$effects)

synclr_pairs <- cmf$synaptic_clearance_plate$pairs
synclr_pair_df <- data.frame(
  x = synclr_pairs$contrast_label,
  y = synclr_pairs$feature_label_plot,
  count = synclr_pairs$plot_effect,
  earned = as.character(synclr_pairs$plot_status) == "supported/earned",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

geo_int <- one_row(geom_counts, geom_counts$contrast == "interaction", "GeoMx interaction counts")
geo_amy_k <- one_row(geom_counts, geom_counts$contrast == "nlgf_in_maptki", "GeoMx amyloid MAPTKI counts")
geo_amy_p <- one_row(geom_counts, geom_counts$contrast == "nlgf_in_p301s", "GeoMx amyloid P301S counts")
bulk_primary_sig <- sum(run_index$n_primary_sig, na.rm = TRUE)
bulk_lost <- sum(run_index$n_lost_or_flipped, na.rm = TRUE)
bulk_loss_pct <- if (bulk_primary_sig > 0) round(100 * bulk_lost / bulk_primary_sig, 1) else 0
worst_run <- run_index[order(-run_index$n_lost_or_flipped, run_index$layer,
                             match(run_index$contrast, names(contrast_labels)),
                             method = "radix", na.last = TRUE), , drop = FALSE][1L, ]
decon_reasons <- if (length(decon$reasons)) paste(decon$reasons, collapse = "; ") else "no blocking reason recorded"
decon_unresolved <- if (is.list(decon$decon) && is.data.frame(decon$decon$unresolved_aoi)) {
  decon$decon$unresolved_aoi
} else {
  data.frame()
}
decon_unresolved_n <- if (nrow(decon_unresolved)) length(unique(decon_unresolved$aoi)) else 0L
decon_unresolved_sentence <- if (decon_unresolved_n > 0L) {
  paste0(decon_unresolved_n, " AOIs have near-zero total beta in the attempted fit")
} else {
  decon_reasons
}
decon_ref <- if (is.data.frame(decon$reference) && nrow(decon$reference)) decon$reference else data.frame()
decon_ref_sentence <- if (nrow(decon_ref)) {
  paste0(
    paste0(decon_ref$arm, " profile ", decon_ref$status, " (",
           fmt_int(decon_ref$n_genes), " genes x ", decon_ref$n_profiles,
           " profiles, max |cor| ", fmt_num(decon_ref$max_abs_correlation, 2), ")"),
    collapse = "; "
  )
} else {
  "reference-profile summary unavailable in this compact bundle"
}
decon_nuclei_sentence <- if (is.list(decon$decon) && is.list(decon$decon$nuclei) &&
                             isFALSE(decon$decon$nuclei$absolute_rescaling_enabled)) {
  paste0("Nuclei-rescaled absolute cell counts remain disabled",
         if (is.finite(decon$decon$nuclei$n_sentinel %||% NA_real_)) {
           paste0(" (", decon$decon$nuclei$n_sentinel, " sentinel nuclei values)")
         } else {
           ""
         })
} else {
  "Nuclei-rescaled absolute cell counts are not used"
}
decon_audit <- if (is.list(decon$residual_audit) && is.data.frame(decon$residual_audit$summary)) {
  decon$residual_audit$summary
} else {
  data.frame()
}
decon_audit_sentence <- if (nrow(decon_audit) && any(is.finite(decon_audit$median_metric))) {
  paste0("residual QC remains available (median RMS residual ",
         paste(paste0(decon_audit$arm, " ", fmt_num(decon_audit$median_metric, 3)),
               collapse = "; "), ")")
} else {
  "residual QC is unavailable"
}
earned_pairs <- pairs[pairs$status == "earned", , drop = FALSE]
earned_sentence <- if (nrow(earned_pairs)) {
  paste0(paste(unique(earned_pairs$pair), collapse = ", "), " in ",
         paste(contrast_labels[earned_pairs$contrast], collapse = ", "))
} else {
  "no pair"
}
fmt_modalities <- function(x) {
  z <- unlist(strsplit(x, ";", fixed = TRUE), use.names = FALSE)
  z <- z[nzchar(z)]
  z <- gsub("_", " ", z, fixed = TRUE)
  paste(z, collapse = ", ")
}
earned_details <- if (nrow(earned_pairs)) {
  vapply(seq_len(nrow(earned_pairs)), function(i) {
    ep <- earned_pairs[i, , drop = FALSE]
    mods <- fmt_modalities(ep$coherent_supported_modalities)
    paste0(fmt_pair(ep$pair), " in ", contrast_labels[ep$contrast],
           if (nzchar(mods)) paste0(" (supported by ", mods, ")") else "")
  }, character(1))
} else {
  character()
}
earned_detail_sentence <- if (length(earned_details)) {
  paste0(if (length(earned_details) == 1L) "The earned row is " else "The earned rows are ",
         paste(earned_details, collapse = "; "), ".")
} else {
  "No measured pair earns a communication claim under the CCC-lite rule."
}
earned_pair_names <- unique(earned_pairs$pair)
closing_support_phrase <- if (length(earned_pair_names)) {
  "DAM activation, synaptic suppression and the earned clearance-axis support"
} else {
  "DAM activation and synaptic suppression, with clearance kept descriptive"
}

closing_model <- sf$closing_model
closing_nodes <- closing_model$nodes
closing_edges <- closing_model$edges
closing_bands <- closing_model$bands
closing_node_fill <- c(input = "#EEF0F3",
                       supported = "#DCEFF1",
                       focused = "#F6E4C3",
                       corroborated = "#E7E3F4",
                       boundary = "#F3E1DE",
                       blocked = "#F1E9D8")
closing_edge_colour <- c(supported = "#0B7A75",
                         focused = "#C8841C",
                         corroborated = "#3F5F7F",
                         boundary = "#A63A50",
                         blocked = "#8A6A32")
closing_edge_lty <- c(supported = "solid",
                      focused = "solid",
                      corroborated = "solid",
                      boundary = "dashed",
                      blocked = "dotdash")
```

## Axis Evidence Plates

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-amyloid-response
#| fig-width: 10.5
#| fig-height: 6.2
#| fig-cap: "Amyloid-response effects align across DAM and antigen-presentation axes."
#| fig-alt: "Concordance matrix: for each DAM and antigen-presentation marker, signed effect fill across snRNAseq, GeoMx, proteome and phosphoproteome in the two amyloid contrasts, with a dark ring on supported cells and a cross on not-observed cells."
plate_support_matrix(amyloid$measured, amyloid$missing, effect_name = "effect (log2)",
                     title = "Amyloid response: DAM and antigen-presentation anchors") +
  facet_grid(axis_label ~ contrast_label, scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  theme(legend.box = "horizontal", legend.text = element_text(size = 7.6))
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-synaptic-clearance
#| fig-width: 10.5
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-cap: "Synaptic loss and clearance support remain axis-bounded."
#| fig-alt: "Composite plate showing synaptic and clearance marker effects across modalities plus clearance-pair support counts."
p_synclr <- plate_support_matrix(synclr$measured, synclr$missing, effect_name = "effect (log2)",
                     title = "Synaptic and clearance markers in amyloid contrasts") +
  facet_grid(axis_label ~ contrast_label, scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  theme(legend.box = "horizontal", legend.text = element_text(size = 7.3))

p_pairs <- plate_pair_matrix(synclr_pair_df,
                     title = "Clearance pairs: coherent supported modalities, not full CCC") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 7.3))

p_synclr / p_pairs + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.52))
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-interaction-boundary
#| fig-width: 10.5
#| fig-height: 6.5
#| fig-cap: "Interaction support narrows outside microglia composition."
#| fig-alt: "Interaction concordance matrix across axes: signed interaction-effect fill per modality with supported rings, not-observed crosses and a blocked SpatialDecon triangle, showing support narrows outside microglia composition."
plate_support_matrix(interaction_bd$measured, interaction_bd$missing,
                     effect_name = "interaction (log2)",
                     title = "Interaction evidence boundary across modalities") +
  facet_wrap(~ axis_label, ncol = 2, scales = "free") +
  theme(legend.box = "horizontal", legend.text = element_text(size = 7.6))
```

## GeoMx Spatial DE

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-geomx-volcano
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-cap: "GeoMx primary volcanoes show dense amyloid structure."
#| fig-alt: "Faceted point volcanoes show GeoMx effect and FDR structure by contrast."
ggplot(geo_volc_points, aes(effect, neg_log10_fdr)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = direction), size = 0.42, alpha = 0.58) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(alpha), linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey70", linewidth = 0.25) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = geo_volc_lab,
    aes(effect, neg_log10_fdr, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.25,
    seed = 42L,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    box.padding = 0.12
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ contrast, ncol = 2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(down = tau_direction_colours[["down"]],
                                 `not significant` = "#B7B1A5",
                                 up = tau_direction_colours[["up"]]),
                      drop = FALSE, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = "GeoMx log2 fold-change", y = "-log10 FDR",
       title = "GeoMx primary spatial DE by contrast") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-geomx-sensitivity
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5.8
#| fig-cap: "GeoMx sensitivity marks rows gained or lost versus the primary model."
#| fig-alt: "Two heatmap panels show primary versus sensitivity GeoMx supported-row counts plus signed lost, gained and sign-flip counts."
geo_sens_total <- rbind(
  data.frame(geo_sens[c("fit_label", "contrast")],
             model = "primary", n = geo_sens$n_primary_sig, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(geo_sens[c("fit_label", "contrast")],
             model = "sensitivity", n = geo_sens$n_sensitivity_sig, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
geo_sens_total$model <- factor(geo_sens_total$model, levels = c("primary", "sensitivity"))
geo_sens_total$label <- ifelse(geo_sens_total$n == 0, "", fmt_int(geo_sens_total$n))
geo_sens_change <- rbind(
  data.frame(geo_sens[c("fit_label", "contrast")],
             metric = "lost", n_signed = -geo_sens$n_lost, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(geo_sens[c("fit_label", "contrast")],
             metric = "gained", n_signed = geo_sens$n_gained, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(geo_sens[c("fit_label", "contrast")],
             metric = "sign flip", n_signed = geo_sens$n_sign_flip, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
geo_sens_change$metric <- factor(geo_sens_change$metric,
                                 levels = c("lost", "gained", "sign flip"))
geo_sens_change$label <- ifelse(abs(geo_sens_change$n_signed) == 0, "",
                                fmt_int(abs(geo_sens_change$n_signed)))

p_geo_total <- ggplot(geo_sens_total, aes(model, contrast, fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.24, width = 0.9, height = 0.82) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.55, colour = "#262B2F") +
  facet_wrap(~ fit_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_rwb(name = "supported rows", midpoint = NULL) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Supported rows by model") +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 18, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none")

p_geo_change <- ggplot(geo_sens_change, aes(metric, contrast, fill = n_signed)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.24, width = 0.9, height = 0.82) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.45, colour = "#333333") +
  facet_wrap(~ fit_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_rwb(name = "signed rows", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       title = "Rows lost, gained or direction-flipped versus primary") +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 18, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom")

p_geo_total / p_geo_change +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.86, 1.14))
```

## Bulk Proteome And Phospho

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-phospho-correction
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-cap: "Parent correction changes bulk phosphosite effect geometry."
#| fig-alt: "Faceted scatter plots compare raw and parent-corrected phosphosite effects."
ggplot(pc_points, aes(raw_logFC, corrected_logFC)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey80", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey80", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = status), size = 0.36, alpha = 0.42) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = pc_lab,
    aes(raw_logFC, corrected_logFC, label = site_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.1,
    seed = 42L,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    box.padding = 0.12
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ contrast, ncol = 2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(`not significant` = "#B7B1A5",
                                 `raw only` = "#3F5F7F",
                                 `corrected only` = "#0B7A75",
                                 both = "#A63A50"),
                      drop = FALSE, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = "raw phosphosite log2 fold-change",
       y = "parent-corrected phosphosite log2 fold-change",
       title = "Parent correction changes phosphosite effect geometry") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Closing Model

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-closing-model
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 5.25
#| fig-cap: "The closing model keeps support and boundaries together."
#| fig-alt: "Graphical model showing amyloid-driven DAM activation, P301S-amplified DAM composition, unsupported progression beyond composition, Myc support, NF-kB and Gsk3b boundaries, and blocked spatial abundance/full CCC."
ggplot() +
  geom_rect(data = closing_bands,
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, fill = "#F7F5EF", colour = NA, alpha = 0.82) +
  geom_text(data = closing_bands,
            aes(label_x, label_y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold",
            size = 3.0, colour = "#53504A") +
  geom_segment(
    data = closing_edges,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend,
        colour = edge_state, linetype = edge_state),
    linewidth = 0.72,
    arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.12, "inches"), type = "closed"),
    alpha = 0.86
  ) +
  geom_text(data = closing_edges,
            aes(label_x, label_y, label = label, colour = edge_state),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 2.45, fontface = "bold",
            show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_label(
    data = closing_nodes,
    aes(x, y, label = text, fill = node_state),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    colour = "#262B2F",
    linewidth = 0.25,
    label.padding = grid::unit(0.16, "lines"),
    label.r = grid::unit(0.06, "lines"),
    size = 2.75,
    lineheight = 0.92
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = closing_node_fill, guide = "none") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = closing_edge_colour, name = "connection") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = closing_edge_lty, name = "connection") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.38, 5.10), ylim = c(0.42, 3.02), clip = "off") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
       title = "Closing synthesis model") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.0))) +
  theme_void(base_size = 10.8) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "#262B2F", hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 18, 6, 18),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(colour = "#333333"),
    legend.text = element_text(colour = "#333333")
  )
```
